palette_hint: warm off-white background (#f7f3ee), deep espresso text (#1c1208), dusty rose accent (#c4736a), and muted sage for secondary accents (#7a9e87)
type_style: Georgia or serif for headlines and body text, bold large headlines with generous line-height, italics used for pull-quotes and bylines, refined and literary feel
description: Inkwell Quarterly is a fictional literary and cultural review publishing long-form essays, author interviews, and critical notebook entries across five editorially styled pages.
constraints: fixed-width centered container of 960px with generous side padding
top nav has the masthead name 'INKWELL QUARTERLY' in bold serif on the left and five navigation links right-aligned in small caps
every page shares a footer with a thin top border, two columns: left holds a short mission blurb, right holds issue info and a contact email
section headings use a dusty rose (#c4736a) left border (4px solid) as a decorative rule
article cards use a simple bordered box (1px solid #d4ccc4) with rounded corners (4px) and internal padding, laid out with flexbox or grid

page_specs.front-page: A large editorial masthead area with the current issue title 'Volume XII — The Restless City' and a two-sentence editorial note. Below that, a 2-column CSS grid showing the three lead stories as featured cards, each with a bold headline, 40-word excerpt, and italic byline. A secondary horizontal strip lists four shorter 'Also In This Issue' items as flex row entries.
page_specs.essays: Full essays listing page headed 'Essays & Criticism' with a brief 20-word section description. A vertical stack of eight essay preview cards, each showing: essay title in large bold serif, author name in italic dusty rose, a 50-word abstract, and a 'Read Essay' text link. Cards are separated by a thin horizontal rule.
page_specs.interviews: Page titled 'Conversations' featuring a 3-column CSS grid of interview cards. Each card contains an author name, a bold interview headline (e.g., 'On Exile and Language: A Talk with Mara Voss'), the interviewer's name in small italic, and a 30-word excerpt. A standout full-width pull-quote from the lead interview sits between the heading and the grid, styled in large italic serif with a dusty rose color.
page_specs.notebook: The Notebook page is a curated column of short critical observations and reading notes. The layout is single-column, narrow (max 640px centered), with entries styled like journal posts: a small date label in sage green, a bold short title, and 60–80 words of body text. Eight entries are shown, separated by centered asterisk dividers.
page_specs.about: Two-column layout: the left column (wider, ~60%) carries the magazine's founding story in three short paragraphs, the editorial philosophy statement, and a list of five contributing editors with their areas of focus. The right column (~40%) holds the current issue details (volume, date, theme), submission guidelines as a short bulleted list, and a boxed subscription callout with a dusty rose border and a 'Subscribe by Post' button.
